env: VSS alerts profile already deployed in CV verification mode (`deploy -p alerts -m verification`). Sensor `warehouse_sample` registered in VIOS with a live RTSP stream. Pre-authorized to deploy prerequisites.
description: CV mode routing: Workflow A (onboard camera) and Workflow C (query incidents on CV). Subscription/notification surfaces (Workflows D and E) are scoped to VLM real-time mode only and are exercised in the VLM-mode evals.

expects.query: Add camera rtsp://192.168.1.100:554/stream1 to the alerts pipeline
checks: The trajectory calls VIOS `POST /sensor/add` with the RTSP URL — Workflow A onboarding.
The agent does NOT call Alert Bridge or `POST /generate` with start-alert intent — on CV, onboarding the RTSP is the only step needed.
The agent confirms the sensor was added and that the CV pipeline will pick it up automatically.

expects.query: Show me recent alerts for sensor warehouse_sample
checks: The trajectory calls `POST /generate` with a query intent — Workflow C works on both CV and VLM modes.
The agent's reply summarizes incidents or states that none have been recorded yet.
The agent does NOT refuse the query or suggest redeployment — querying incidents is valid on CV.
